overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic district at night. The scene features wet cobblestone streets, Victorian architecture with wrought iron balconies, Spanish moss-draped trees, and a horse-drawn carriage passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential sidewalk with stone walls and gas lamps

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone sidewalk beside stone walls and Victorian mansions

entered.detail: two-story historic building with wooden balconies and wrought iron railings
tall stone wall covered in patches of ivy and moss
cast iron lamp post emitting warm yellow light through the rain
large oak trees draped with hanging Spanish moss
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the gas lamp light
grassy park area visible through the trees across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a stone wall and Victorian mansions on the right, with a park area visible through moss-draped trees on the left. Gas street lamps cast warm light through the misty night air, creating reflections on the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential sidewalk with wrought iron fencing

events.description: stone wall transitions to wrought iron fence with stone pillars

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the architecture shifts from stone walls to decorative iron fencing

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence with decorative spikes mounted on stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the stone wall gives way to a wrought iron fence. The Victorian mansion remains prominent on the right, while the gas lamps continue to illuminate the misty path ahead. The rain persists, creating a steady atmosphere of the historic district.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic street with passing carriage traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters view from the left, moving along the street
character stops walking and looks around the rainy street

agents.ego_description: halting on the sidewalk to observe surroundings as the carriage passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from left to right along the wet street

entered.detail: wooden carriage with large wheels pulled by horses, moving through the rain

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and moves along the street, passing the stationary character. The character stops walking and stands on the sidewalk, looking around the rainy historic district as the carriage continues down the road and the gas lamps flicker in the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked historic street that shifts from a steady walk past grand estates to a stationary observation of the misty district. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a stone wall and Victorian mansions, while moss-draped trees frame a park to the left under the warm glow of gas lamps. As the character progresses, the stone wall transitions into a wrought iron fence, maintaining the atmospheric rain and the flickering light of the lamps ahead. The scene then shifts as a horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and passes by, prompting the character to come to a halt. Finally, the camera lingers on the character standing still on the sidewalk, looking around the rainy environment as the carriage disappears down the road into the mist.
